name: Quick File Name

releases.author: Wapply
releases.description:
## Fixes and Changes

- Updated the plugin description to remove redundancy.
- Set the minimum Obsidian app version to the latest public release.
- Removed unnecessary manifest properties (`compatible`).
- Removed default hotkey recommendation.
- Adjusted UI text in settings to use sentence case.
- Utilized `this.app.fileManager.getNewFileParent` to get the path to the folder configured under _Settings > Files & Links > Default location for new notes_.

releases.author: Wapply
releases.description:
## Fixes and Changes

- Updated `generateRandomNoteName` function in `main.ts` to always open the newly created note, even if no note was previously opened.
- Updated settings name from `Random Note Generator Settings` to `Quick File Name Settings`.

releases.author: Wapply
releases.description:
## Fixes and Changes

- Automatically opens every generated note in a new tab.

releases.author: Wapply
releases.description:
This is the initial release of **obsidian-quick-file-name**, a plugin for Obsidian that generates a note with a random string as its name.

## Features

- Generate a new random note with a customizable name.
- Customize the length of the random string.
- Include or exclude uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols in the random string.
